title: Tokenized US Treasurys rise by over $1B since start of 2026
message_html: Tokenized US Treasurys rise by over $1B since start of 2026 ...
snippet: The tokenized US Treasury market had a market capitalization of under $4 billion at the start of 2025 and has been gradually rising.

title: Revolut joins financial watchdog’s stablecoin sandbox as UK rushes to catch up to US
message_html: Revolut joins financial watchdog’s stablecoin sandbox as UK rushes to catch up to US ...
snippet: The Financial Conduct Authority said the primary focus of the sandbox will be issuing stablecoins in real-world conditions.
